headline: Can Project Fresh Save The Wendy's Company?
summary: The all-time high for Wendy's stock (NASDAQ: WEN) was $29.46 back in June 2021. Today, it trades around $8. That's a brutal 70% collapse for one of the biggest fast-food brands in the world.
